decision.summary: Hold the open April 15 73k dip position and do not open any new price-hit or floor trade.
decision.rationale: The latest Beecthor transcript and summaries keep the broader thesis bearish, but the newest view also says not to chase and prefers a pullback toward roughly 73.2k-72.4k before any possible final push higher. Binance at 74088.18 is mildly weak intraday and near the 24h low, but the existing `will-bitcoin-dip-to-73k-on-april-15` Yes position is only around 23.5% and far below the 90-95% take-profit zone, while early-stage rules keep stop-loss disabled. The daily slot is already filled, weekly bearish price-hit alternatives are still too discounted for a clean edge, bullish weekly reach markets do not have strong confirmation from the current setup, and the floor market above 74k is invalid because Beecthor still allows BTC to trade back below 74k.
